text_excerpt: News | Dr Ben Spencer MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home My Plan News Campaigns About Dr Ben Spencer Flooding contact information News Government Draft Planning Policy Risks Causing Irreparable Damage to Communities and Our Environment Friday, 13 March, 2026 This week I submitted my response to the Government consultation on its revised national planning policy framework. It is incredibly concerning that the draft NPPF risks creating a developer's charter that could cause irreparable damage. The proposals have clearly been prepared as a means to enable huge levels of development in order to meet Government manifesto promises, but fail to recognise...
